phrases.phrase: Σαλμὼν δὲ ἐγέννησεν τὸν Βόες ἐκ τῆς Ῥαχάβ
phrases.translation: And Salmon begot Boaz of Rahab.
phrases.summary: The text states that Salmon fathered (begot) Boaz, specifying Rahab as Boaz’s mother.

phrases.phrase: Βόες δὲ ἐγέννησεν τὸν Ἰωβὴδ ἐκ τῆς Ῥούθ
phrases.translation: And Boaz begot Obed of Ruth.
phrases.summary: The text states that Boaz fathered (begot) Obed, identifying Ruth as Obed’s mother.
The text states that Obed fathered (begot) Jesse, continuing the family line described in the passage.
